name: sentinel
description: Claude Code discipline layer + SOC 2 compliance + PETRA review system — cost tracking, git hygiene, PHI scanning, prompt audit, secret detection, TDD nudge, subagent awareness, PR size gating, multi-agent code review with KAIROS pattern learning
author: Christina Cephus

v5_skills.debug_routing: Debug keyword tier — Sonnet minimum for debugging tasks
v5_skills.code_review_routing: Review keyword tier — appropriate model for code review complexity
v5_skills.subagent_tracking: PostToolUse tracks Agent tool spawns and warns on cost
v5_skills.tdd_nudge: Stronger test file coverage warnings for source changes
v5_skills.pr_size_gating: Pre-push diff size warnings with configurable thresholds
v5_skills.smart_compaction: Context growth analysis with targeted /compact recommendations

v6_skills.phi_scanner: PHI/PII pattern detection in prompts and Bash commands (SOC 2)
v6_skills.secret_scanner: Secret/credential detection in commands and file writes (SOC 2)
v6_skills.sensitive_file_detection: Warns when writing to .env, credentials.json, *.pem, etc.

v7_skills.petra_review: /petra — 5-agent parallel PR review with re-review, self-review, and KAIROS pattern learning
v7_skills.petra_rebuild: /petra-rebuild — KAIROS pattern extraction from GitHub PR history
v7_skills.phi_patterns_unified: 18 HIPAA Safe Harbor patterns in single config file (phi_patterns.json)
v7_skills.repo_agnostic: Auto-detect repo from git remote for all gh commands

config.sentinel_config: config/sentinel_config.json — feature toggles for v6.0 SOC 2 features
config.phi_patterns: config/phi_patterns.json — 18 HIPAA Safe Harbor identifiers (single source of truth)
